docker-compose.yml.description: Nextcloud-Stack: postgres, redis, nextcloud mit Traefik-Labels, Healthchecks, Logging-Rotation, User 33:33
docker-compose.yml.content:
version: '3.8'
services:
  postgres:
    image: postgres:16.6-alpine
    container_name: nextcloud-postgres
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: nextcloud
      POSTGRES_USER: nextcloud
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD}
    volumes:
      - postgres-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
      - ./init.sh:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/init.sh:ro
    networks:
      - internal
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U nextcloud -d nextcloud"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    logging:
      driver: json-file
      options:
        max-size: "10m"
        max-file: "3"
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits: { cpus: "1", memory: "512M" }
        reservations: { cpus: "0.25", memory: "256M" }

  redis:
    image: redis:7.4-alpine
    container_name: nextcloud-redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    command: sh -c "envsubst < /etc/redis/users.acl.tmpl > /tmp/users.acl && redis-server /etc/redis/redis.conf --aclfile /tmp/users.acl"
    volumes:
      - redis-data:/data
      - ./redis.conf:/etc/redis/redis.conf:ro
      - ./redis-users.acl.tmpl:/etc/redis/users.acl.tmpl:ro
    networks:
      - internal
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "-a", "${REDIS_PASSWORD}", "ping"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    logging:
      driver: json-file
      options:
        max-size: "10m"
        max-file: "3"
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits: { cpus: "1", memory: "512M" }
        reservations: { cpus: "0.25", memory: "128M" }

  nextcloud:
    image: nextcloud:31.0.2-apache
    container_name: nextcloud-app
    restart: unless-stopped
    user: "33:33"
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: nextcloud
      POSTGRES_USER: nextcloud
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD}
      POSTGRES_HOST: postgres
      REDIS_HOST: redis
      REDIS_HOST_PASSWORD: ${REDIS_PASSWORD}
      NEXTCLOUD_ADMIN_USER: ${NEXTCLOUD_ADMIN_USER}
      NEXTCLOUD_ADMIN_PASSWORD: ${NEXTCLOUD_ADMIN_PASSWORD}
      NEXTCLOUD_TRUSTED_DOMAINS: cloud.example.com
      TRUSTED_PROXIES: 172.16.0.0/12
      OVERWRITECLIURL: https://cloud.example.com
      PHP_MEMORY_LIMIT: 512M
      PHP_UPLOAD_LIMIT: 10G
      NEXTCLOUD_LOGLEVEL: 2
    volumes:
      - nextcloud_data:/var/www/html
      - nextcloud_config:/var/www/html/config
      - nextcloud_custom_apps:/var/www/html/custom_apps
    networks:
      - internal
      - web
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-fSs", "http://localhost/status.php"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 60s
    logging:
      driver: json-file
      options:
        max-size: "10m"
        max-file: "3"
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits: { cpus: "2.0", memory: "4Gi" }
        reservations: { cpus: "0.5", memory: "1Gi" }
    labels:
      - "traefik.enable=true"
      - "traefik.docker.network=web"
      - "traefik.http.routers.nextcloud-http.rule=Host(`cloud.example.com`)"
      - "traefik.http.routers.nextcloud-http.entrypoints=web"
      - "traefik.http.routers.nextcloud-http.middlewares=nextcloud-redirectscheme@file"
      - "traefik.http.routers.nextcloud.rule=Host(`cloud.example.com`)"
      - "traefik.http.routers.nextcloud.entrypoints=websecure"
      - "traefik.http.routers.nextcloud.tls=true"
      - "traefik.http.routers.nextcloud.tls.certresolver=acme-resolver"
      - "traefik.http.routers.nextcloud.middlewares=nextcloud-headers@file,nextcloud-ratelimit@file"
      - "traefik.http.services.nextcloud.loadbalancer.server.port=80"

networks:
  internal:
    name: internal
  web:
    external: true
    name: web

volumes:
  postgres-data:
    name: postgres-data
  redis-data:
    name: redis-data
  nextcloud_data:
    name: nextcloud_data
  nextcloud_config:
    name: nextcloud_config
  nextcloud_custom_apps:
    name: nextcloud_custom_apps

env.template.content:
# Datenbank
POSTGRES_DB=nextcloud
POSTGRES_USER=nextcloud
POSTGRES_PASSWORD=${DB_PASSWORD}

# Nextcloud Admin
NEXTCLOUD_ADMIN_USER=${NEXTCLOUD_ADMIN_USER}
NEXTCLOUD_ADMIN_PASSWORD=${NEXTCLOUD_ADMIN_PASSWORD}

# Redis
REDIS_PASSWORD=${REDIS_PASSWORD}

# Nextcloud Config
NEXTCLOUD_TRUSTED_DOMAINS=cloud.example.com
TRUSTED_PROXIES=172.16.0.0/12
OVERWRITECLIURL=https://cloud.example.com
PHP_MEMORY_LIMIT=512M
PHP_UPLOAD_LIMIT=10G
NEXTCLOUD_LOGLEVEL=2

# OIDC (Keycloak)
OIDC_CLIENT_ID=${OIDC_CLIENT_ID}
OIDC_CLIENT_SECRET=${OIDC_CLIENT_SECRET}

# Backup
BACKUP_RETENTION_DAYS=7
BACKUP_DIR=/opt/backups/nextcloud

traefik-dynamic.yml.description: Traefik dynamic config: TLS-Optionen, Security-Headers, RedirectScheme, RateLimit
traefik-dynamic.yml.content:
tls:
  options:
    modern:
      minVersion: VersionTLS12
      cipherSuites:
        - TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384
        - TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_GCM_SHA384
        - TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256
        - TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256
        - TLS_ECDHE_ECDSA_WITH_CHACHA20_POLY1305
        - TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_CHACHA20_POLY1305
      sniStrict: true

http:
  middlewares:
    nextcloud-headers:
      headers:
        customRequestHeaders:
          X-Forwarded-For: ""
          X-Forwarded-Proto: ""
          X-Forwarded-Host: ""
        customResponseHeaders:
          X-Robots-Tag: "noindex,nofollow"
          X-Frame-Options: "SAMEORIGIN"
          X-Content-Type-Options: "nosniff"
          Referrer-Policy: "strict-origin-when-cross-origin"
        stsSeconds: 63072000
        stsIncludeSubdomains: true
        stsPreload: true
        contentTypeNosniff: true
        browserXssFilter: true
        forceSTSHeader: true

    nextcloud-redirectscheme:
      redirectScheme:
        scheme: https
        permanent: true

    nextcloud-ratelimit:
      rateLimit:
        average: 10
        burst: 20

init.sh.description: Idempotentes DB-Init: CREATE ROLE + DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS via heredoc

redis.conf.description: Redis Konfiguration mit ACL-File (kein Passwort in cmdline)
redis.conf.content:
aclfile /etc/redis/users.acl
appendonly yes
maxmemory 256mb
maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
save 900 1
save 300 10
save 60 10000

redis-users.acl.tmpl.description: Redis ACL Template — wird via envsubst beim Container-Start gerendert

backup.sh.content:
#!/bin/bash
# Nextcloud Backup: DB-Dump + Config-Snapshot
set -e

BACKUP_DIR="${BACKUP_DIR:-/opt/backups/nextcloud}"
RETENTION_DAYS="${BACKUP_RETENTION_DAYS:-7}"
DATE=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)

echo "[$(date)] Starte Backup..."
mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR/$DATE"

# 1) PostgreSQL Dump
docker compose exec -T postgres pg_dump -U nextcloud nextcloud > "$BACKUP_DIR/$DATE/nextcloud-db.sql"

# 2) Config + Custom Apps sichern
docker compose exec -T nextcloud tar -czf - -C /var/www/html config custom_apps > "$BACKUP_DIR/$DATE/nextcloud-files.tar.gz"

echo "[$(date)] Backup erstellt: $BACKUP_DIR/$DATE"

# Retention: Alte Backups loeschen
find "$BACKUP_DIR" -maxdepth 1 -type d -mtime +$RETENTION_DAYS -exec rm -rf {} \;
echo "[$(date)] Alte Backups (> $RETENTION_DAYS Tage) bereinigt"

healthcheck-monitor.sh.description: Cron-Job fuer Health-Alerting (prueft docker health status)
healthcheck-monitor.sh.content:
#!/bin/bash
# Docker Healthcheck Monitor
WEBHOOK_URL="${HEALTHCHECK_WEBHOOK:-}"
ALERT_EMAIL="${ALERT_EMAIL:-admin@example.com}"

for svc in nextcloud-postgres nextcloud-redis nextcloud-app; do
  STATUS=$(docker inspect --format='{{.State.Health.Status}}' "$svc" 2>/dev/null || echo "missing")
  if [ "$STATUS" != "healthy" ]; then
    MSG="ALARM: $svc ist $STATUS"
    echo "[$(date)] $MSG"
    if [ -n "$WEBHOOK_URL" ]; then
      curl -fsS -X POST "$WEBHOOK_URL" -d "$MSG"
    fi
    if [ -n "$ALERT_EMAIL" ]; then
      echo "$MSG" | mail -s "Healthcheck Alert: $svc" "$ALERT_EMAIL"
    fi
  fi
done

deploy_steps.command: docker version && docker compose config --quiet && docker network inspect web >/dev/null 2>&1 || docker network create web && docker network inspect internal >/dev/null 2>&1 || docker network create internal
deploy_steps.validation: docker compose config ohne Fehler, Netzwerke vorhanden

deploy_steps.description: .env auf Vollstaendigkeit pruefen (alle Variablen aus env.template muessen gesetzt sein)
deploy_steps.command: grep -oP '\$\{\K[^}]+' env.template | while read var; do grep -q "^$var=" .env || { echo "FEHLER: $var fehlt in .env"; exit 1; }; done
for vol in postgres-data redis-data nextcloud_data nextcloud_config nextcloud_custom_apps; do docker volume create $vol 2>/dev/null || true; done

deploy_steps.description: Pre-Deploy Snapshot falls Stack bereits laeuft
deploy_steps.command: docker compose ps postgres --format json 2>/dev/null | grep -q running && ./backup.sh || echo 'Kein laufender Stack — kein Pre-Deploy-Backup noetig'

deploy_steps.description: Postgres starten → Redis starten → Nextcloud starten (mit Readiness-Checks)
deploy_steps.command: docker compose up -d postgres && echo 'Warte auf Postgres...' && until docker compose exec -T postgres pg_isready -U nextcloud -d nextcloud; do sleep 2; done && docker compose up -d redis && echo 'Warte auf Redis...' && until docker compose exec -T redis redis-cli -a "${REDIS_PASSWORD}" ping | grep -q PONG; do sleep 2; done && docker compose up -d nextcloud && echo 'Warte auf Nextcloud (bis 120s)...' && for i in $(seq 1 24); do curl -fsSo /dev/null https://cloud.example.com/status.php 2>/dev/null && break; sleep 5; done
deploy_steps.rollback_on_failure: docker compose stop nextcloud redis postgres

deploy_steps.command: docker compose ps && docker inspect nextcloud-app --format='{{.State.Health.Status}}' | grep -q healthy && curl -fsS https://cloud.example.com/status.php

deploy_steps.description: OIDC idempotent via occ konfigurieren (nur wenn nicht bereits konfiguriert)
deploy_steps.command: if ! docker compose exec -T --user www-data nextcloud php occ config:app:get sociallogin oidc_provider_url 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'https://'; then docker compose exec -T --user www-data nextcloud php occ app:enable sociallogin && docker compose exec -T --user www-data nextcloud php occ config:app:set sociallogin custom_provider --value=custom_oidc && docker compose exec -T --user www-data nextcloud php occ config:app:set sociallogin oidc_provider_url --value='https://auth.example.com/realms/master' && docker compose exec -T --user www-data nextcloud php occ config:app:set sociallogin oidc_client_id --value="${OIDC_CLIENT_ID}" && docker compose exec -T --user www-data nextcloud php occ config:app:set sociallogin oidc_client_secret --value="${OIDC_CLIENT_SECRET}" && docker compose exec -T --user www-data nextcloud php occ config:app:set sociallogin oidc_redirect_url --value='https://cloud.example.com/apps/sociallogin/custom_oidc/redirect' && docker compose exec -T --user www-data nextcloud php occ config:app:set sociallogin disable_registration --value=true; else echo 'OIDC bereits konfiguriert — ueberspringe'; fi

deploy_steps.description: Soll-Konfiguration als Referenz speichern fuer Drift-Erkennung

rollback_steps.command: docker compose stop nextcloud redis postgres

rollback_steps.description: DB aus letztem Backup-Dump wiederherstellen (falls verfuegbar)
rollback_steps.command: LATEST_BACKUP=$(ls -t /opt/backups/nextcloud/*/nextcloud-db.sql 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -f "$LATEST_BACKUP" ]; then docker compose up -d postgres && sleep 5 && docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U nextcloud -d nextcloud < "$LATEST_BACKUP" && echo 'DB restored'; else echo 'Kein Backup gefunden — Daten-Rollback nicht moeglich'; fi
git checkout HEAD~1 -- docker-compose.yml env.template traefik-dynamic.yml

rollback_steps.description: Container neu starten mit wiederhergestellter Config

init_commands.description: DB-Rolle und Datenbank idempotent via init.sh im Postgres-Entrypoint
Nextcloud Auto-Install bei erstem Start via Entrypoint (occ maintenance:install)
OIDC-Konfiguration idempotent via occ (nur wenn nicht bereits konfiguriert)
init_commands.command: php occ config:app:get sociallogin oidc_provider_url (pre-check) + config:app:set fuer OIDC-Provider

nextcloud_major_upgrade: 2. Maintenance-Mode aktivieren: docker compose exec --user www-data nextcloud php occ maintenance:mode --on
4. docker compose pull nextcloud && docker compose up -d nextcloud
5. Upgrade ausfuehren: docker compose exec --user www-data nextcloud php occ upgrade
6. Maintenance-Mode deaktivieren: docker compose exec --user www-data nextcloud php occ maintenance:mode --off
postgres_major_upgrade: 1. pg_dumpall in neuen Container migrieren (nicht in-place pg_upgrade)
2. Neuen postgres-Container mit neuer Version starten
patch_updates: docker compose pull && docker compose up -d --remove-orphans (nur Container mit neuem Image werden neu erstellt)

drift_detection.method: Periodischer Diff der aktuellen docker-compose.yml gegen .docker-compose-reference.yml

assumptions: Traefik laeuft bereits im Netzwerk 'web' mit Entrypoints 'web' (80) und 'websecure' (443)
ACME-Resolver 'acme-resolver' ist in Traefik static config definiert
Secrets werden vor Deployment als Umgebungsvariablen gesetzt (.env-Datei)
Internes Docker-Netzwerk 'internal' wird bei Bedarf erstellt
Nextcloud-Auto-Install laeuft beim ersten Start (60s+ Startup via Entrypoint)
Redis verwendet ACL-File statt --requirepass (kein Passwort in cmdline sichtbar)
Backup-Script wird via Cron taeglich ausgefuehrt
OIDC-Provider Keycloak ist unter https://auth.example.com/realms/master erreichbar und Client vorab registriert
